flowchart TD
    A["**System Core / System Super**<br/>· Owns app lifecycle<br/>· Provides system resources and services<br/>· Schedules built-in app entries"]
    B["Built-In Apps"]
    C["**Files**<br/>· Storage browser<br/>· Local storage entry<br/>· User-facing data access"]
    D["**Settings**<br/>· Device settings<br/>· System configuration<br/>· Permission and preference entry"]
    E["**App Store**<br/>· Local app packages<br/>· Remote app packages<br/>· Install and update entry"]

    A -->|"Loads and hosts"| B
    B -->|"Provides file access"| C
    B -->|"Provides settings entry"| D
    B -->|"Manages app sources"| E
